title: Ericoides pubigerum
taxonomy: Ericoides pubigerum is classified within the family Iridaceae. This family, also known as the iris family, is a group of flowering plants commonly found in temperate regions. The genus Ericoides is a small group of flowering plants, with species primarily distributed in tropical and subtropical regions. The species Ericoides pubigerum is often found growing in damp environments, such as marshes and wetlands. As a member of the Iridaceae family, Ericoides pubigerum shares characteristics with other irises, including showy flowers and linear leaves.
